items.title: Nestlé fired its scandal-clad CEO without a payout—a ‘really unusual’ move, corporate governance expert says
items.description: High-profile executives usually get a “golden parachute,” even after serious misconduct violations.

items.title: McDonald's CEO warns of 'a two-tier economy' as lower-income consumers spend less
items.description: McDonald’s is expanding its value meal menu.

items.title: McDonald's revives Extra Value Meals to woo budget-conscious diners
items.description: McDonald's is expanding its value menu as low-income customers dial back their spending on fast food. Here's when the new prices kick in.

items.title: Down 65% in 2025, Should You Buy the Dip in Krispy Kreme Stock?
items.description: Krispy Kreme caught a quick rush of meme stock fire, but the hype has already burned out.

items.title: Walmart, McDonald’s Are New Goldman Picks. It’s a Bet on a Weak Economy.
items.description: The investment bank also added Valero Energy and Cadence Design Systems to its list of favorite stocks.
